span.p: System Context View: WORKSTATION1 Workflow Backup

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Runs backup, verification,
provisioning, and restore
commands from

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Executes scripts and reads
documentation in

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Lists snapshots and inspects
NAS state through

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Reads ZFS used, availability,
usedbysnapshots, and snapshot
count from

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Allows receiver-mode rsync
and mkdir only under current
tree

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Sole operator who installs,
verifies, and restores
WORKSTATION1 workflow
backups.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Repo-owned backup automation
that mirrors
workflow-critical WSL and
Windows artifacts to TrueNAS
through a restricted runtime
identity, preserves rollback
points with ZFS snapshots,
records run history, writes
restore checksums, and alerts
only on failure.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Workflow-critical WSL paths:
~/repos, ~/.hermes, ~/.ssh,
systemd user config,
lifelog/browser-memory data,
and optional brain-code tree.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Selected Windows user-profile
artifacts: Desktop,
Documents, Downloads, Windows
.ssh/.wslconfig, Terminal/VS
Code/PowerShell config,
Chrome profile metadata, and
Startup entries.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Configured encrypted TrueNAS
dataset with current mirror
tree, manifests, SMB share,
restore checksum manifest,
refquota, and ZFS snapshot
history.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div: TrueNAS Middleware and ZFS Control Plane

Configured admin SSH and
middleware surface used for
ZFS properties, runtime-user
setup, snapshot tasks, SMB
share configuration, and
verification.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
External API used only for
backup failure notifications.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Local shell, rsync, SSH,
Windows Previous Versions,
and README/runbook commands
used for verification and
targeted restores.
